 * @fires MdWeekPickerComponent#onWeekPickerButtonOkClick
 * @fires MdWeekPickerComponent#onWeekPickerButtonLabelClick
 * @fires MdWeekPickerComponent#onWeekPickerButtonClick
 */
name: MdWeekPickerComponent
